title: Audit resilience gaps and existing mechanisms
goal: Produce a commit-bound gap matrix mapping each of the ten resilience principles to existing contracts, concrete live defects, missing behavior, truth owner, pilot and stop criterion.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: All ten principles map to existing mechanisms, gaps, owners, pilots and stop criteria.
The matrix includes current task-projection, lease, connector and recovery evidence with timestamps and epistemic limits.
Every proposed field and effect has exactly one existing truth owner.
The matrix derives an evidence-based dependency order and identifies work that must wait for foreign claims.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
